title: Referencing points by name
description:
Referencing points by name

Referencing points by name

You can assign names to point numbers so you can refer to points by name in a program.

Assign names on [Robot Manager]-[Point Data] tab on the toolbar or from the editor of the point data in the Epson RC+ 8.0 menu-[File]-[Open File]. Names must be unique for each point number when used in the same point file.

Point labels can include up to 32 one-byte alphanumeric, Japanese, and the underscore characters, or 16 two-byte characters. Characters can be upper case or lower case. Only alphabets and Japanese can be used for the first letter.

For i = 0 To 10

  Go pick

  Jump place

Next i
examples:
For i = 0 To 10 Go pick Jump place
Next i
